description: Verify the rewards domain migrations, metadata registration, constraints, progression behavior, reversal support, repeatable objective handling, and regression protections.

items.description: Inventory the implemented rewards schema, migration chain, and current test coverage before expanding verification.
steps: Summarize exact current coverage and identify the remaining verification gaps.

items.description: Add metadata/migration/bootstrap verification coverage for all rewards tables and model registration surfaces.
steps: Verify all rewards models are registered in metadata.
Verify migrations produce the expected table surface.

items.description: Add regression tests for tier/milestone structure, points accumulation, and current-state summary behavior.
steps: Test Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum/Plus structure and 100-point milestone behavior.
Test current-state rewards summary updates against event/ledger changes.

items.description: Add regression tests for objective progress behavior, including repeatable objectives and milestone objectives.
steps: Test milestone objectives as objective records/progress surfaces.

items.description: Add regression tests for point/reward reversal-capable data behavior without inventing unapproved reversal policy logic.
steps: Verify the schema and data model can record reversals/revocations cleanly.
Do not over-assume policy windows not yet locked beyond the approved principle that some reversals exist.

items.description: Add regression tests for queued notification/presentation data behavior and seen/skip handling.
steps: Verify skip/seen state transitions at the data layer.

items.description: Add structural regression protections so future runs cannot collapse rewards models into a generic file or break metadata discovery.
steps: Verify one-table-per-file expectations for rewards domain models.

items.description: Run the authoritative docker test suite and mark this spec complete only when green.
steps: Run the full authoritative docker test suite.
Only mark this item complete when green.
